affiliations.name: U.S. Census Bureau, Center for Economic Studies
affiliations.name_hu: Egyesült Államok Census Bureau, Center for Economic Studies

bio_en: Zoltan Wolf is an applied microeconomist working with U.S. Census Bureau plant-level data on firm dynamics, productivity dispersion, and the macro consequences of micro heterogeneity. His work has appeared in the American Economic Review, the American Economic Journal: Macroeconomics, the Review of Economics and Statistics, and the Review of Income and Wealth. He has been a long-time contributor to the Census Bureau's Collaborative Micro-Productivity Project.
bio_hu: Wolf Zoltán alkalmazott mikroökonómus, aki az amerikai Census Bureau telephely-szintű adataival dolgozik a vállalati dinamikák, termelékenységi szóródás és a mikro-heterogenitás makrogazdasági következményei területén. Munkái megjelentek az American Economic Review, American Economic Journal: Macroeconomics, Review of Economics and Statistics és Review of Income and Wealth folyóiratokban. Régóta közreműködője a Census Bureau Collaborative Micro-Productivity Projectjének.
